pages.title: Pack a Canister
pages.text: This little copper-and-gold capsule is workshop stock. It does not do much on its own, but the stabilizer won't come together without it.

pages.title: Workshop Note
pages.text: Think of the canister as the business end of the stabilizer. Craft the canister first, then move on to the full rig once you are ready to protect a horse from ugly falls.
